content: The Self-Refine framework for code optimization can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains the original advantage of no additional training or supervision. This pipeline would first generate multiple divergent initial drafts of output, then use each perspective to critique and refine the others, before converging on a final polished result that fixes more blind spots than single-perspective Self-Refine.
